## User evaluating Mac Mini (32GB M4/M5) for hosting Qwen 3.5 (27B)

The user is considering using a Mac Mini with 32GB (M4 or M5) to host Qwen 3.5 27B locally and asked for token-throughput comparisons. Record this as an ongoing hardware evaluation task: measure or look up expected token throughput and performance tradeoffs for Qwen 3.5 27B on 32GB Mac Minis.
